userStories.title: Add on-all-stories-complete hook
userStories.description: Fires when all stories pass, before deferred regression gate. Payload includes feature, storiesCompleted, and totalCost.
acceptanceCriteria: on-all-stories-complete event is emitted after story loop but before regression
Hook receives NAX_EVENT, NAX_FEATURE, NAX_STATUS, and cost via env/stdin
Works in both sequential and parallel modes

routing.reasoning: New hook requires understanding runner loop sequencing and hook payload passing across multiple components

userStories.title: Move on-complete hook after regression gate
userStories.description: The on-complete hook must fire AFTER everything (including regression) to represent a fully verified state. Remove premature run:completed event from sequential-executor.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: on-complete hook fires after handleRunCompletion() finishes
sequential-executor.ts no longer emits run:completed
Hook payload reflects final success status (including regression result)

userStories.title: Add on-final-regression-fail hook
userStories.description: Fires when deferred regression fails even after rectification attempts are exhausted.
acceptanceCriteria: on-final-regression-fail hook fires on regression failure
Payload includes failedTests count and affectedStories list
Hook triggered correctly in run-completion.ts

userStories.title: Handle deferred regression failure in run-completion.ts
userStories.description: Mark affected stories as 'regression-failed' (new status) and reflect failure in final run result.
acceptanceCriteria: Affected stories marked as 'regression-failed' in PRD
Overall run status is 'failed' if regression gate fails
New StoryStatus 'regression-failed' added to types

userStories.title: Track fullSuiteGatePassed per story
userStories.description: Persist fullSuiteGatePassed to story metrics/PRD. Only true for TDD/Lite strategies when rectification gate passes.
acceptanceCriteria: fullSuiteGatePassed is tracked in PipelineContext
Flag is saved to PRD/metrics for each story
test-after and tdd-simple always have flag as false

userStories.title: Smart-skip deferred regression
userStories.description: Skip deferred regression when every story passed the full-suite gate sequentially.
acceptanceCriteria: Deferred regression skipped if all stories have fullSuiteGatePassed === true
Skip only applies in sequential mode
Skip reason is logged to console

userStories.title: Fix duplicate exit summary (BUG-060)
userStories.description: Remove duplicate stopHeartbeat() and writeExitSummary() from sequential-executor.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Exit summary written once at end of runner.ts
Heartbeat protection active during regression gate
